name: Consistency Audit Jury
description: Evaluates agent response quality and measures response-to-response consistency across multiple trials.

jurors.name: Quality Assessor
jurors.system_prompt: You are evaluating the quality of a customer support agent's response. Be consistent and objective.

jurors.name: Customer Perspective
jurors.system_prompt: You are a customer receiving support. Judge whether the response actually solves your problem.

criteria.name: helpfulness
criteria.description: Does the response directly resolve the customer's issue?

rubric.3: Partially addresses the question but misses key information

criteria.name: tone
criteria.description: Is the response professional and empathetic?
